\tzpentry{ID5529}{Energy Evolution Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5529 introduces Energy Evolution Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$\mathbf{E}=-\dot{\mathbf{A}}-\nabla\Phi$
\]
